file_structure.description: Namespace, ResourceQuota, and LimitRange for sigma-1-dev
ConfigMap aggregating all infra connection strings
CiliumNetworkPolicy CRDs for PM server traffic paths
ServiceAccount, Role, and RoleBinding for PM server
Smoke test Pod manifest for E2E infra validation

scaffolds.interfaces: # No code interfaces for Kubernetes YAML. See function signatures for CRD field structure.
scaffolds.function_signatures:
### Example CRD field structure (YAML, not code)

# Namespace
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: sigma-1-dev
  labels:
    project: sigma-1
    env: dev

# ResourceQuota
apiVersion: v1
kind: ResourceQuota
metadata:
  name: sigma-1-dev-quota
  namespace: sigma-1-dev
spec:
  hard:
    requests.cpu: "4"
    requests.memory: 8Gi
    limits.cpu: "8"
    limits.memory: 16Gi
    pods: "20"
    persistentvolumeclaims: "5"

# LimitRange
apiVersion: v1
kind: LimitRange
metadata:
  name: sigma-1-dev-limits
  namespace: sigma-1-dev
spec:
  limits:
    - default:
        cpu: 500m
        memory: 512Mi
      defaultRequest:
        cpu: 100m
        memory: 128Mi
      max:
        cpu: "2"
        memory: 2Gi
      type: Container

# ExternalSecret (template)
apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1
kind: ExternalSecret
metadata:
  name: sigma-1-linear-api-token
  namespace: sigma-1-dev
spec:
  secretStoreRef:
    name: <store-name>
    kind: SecretStore
  target:
    name: sigma-1-linear-api-token
  data:
    - secretKey: LINEAR_API_TOKEN
      remoteRef:
        key: sigma-1/linear-api-token
scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test stubs for infra YAML (to be run as kubectl commands, not code)
# See test_strategy for CLI checks. Example:
# kubectl get ns sigma-1-dev
# kubectl get resourcequota -n sigma-1-dev
# kubectl get externalsecret -n sigma-1-dev
# kubectl get cnp -n sigma-1-dev
# kubectl logs sigma-1-smoke-test -n sigma-1-dev
